message:
fix(vdbe,core): clear pending delete state on cursor probe and refactor checkpoint adapter to borrow

VDBE engine:
- Clear pending_next_after_delete state on NotFound/NotExists/IfNoHope
  and Found/NoConflict opcodes when they probe a storage cursor, since
  the probe repositions via table_move_to and subsequent Next should
  advance from the new position rather than stale pre-delete state
- Add regression test for delete-then-NotExists-then-Next sequence

WAL adapter:
- Rename CheckpointTargetAdapter to CheckpointTargetAdapterRef to reflect
  that it now borrows the writer (&mut) instead of owning a Box, reducing
  allocation and enabling more flexible lifetime management
- Update tests to use borrowed writer pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
